CHAMBERS FE UI POLISH — three changes + verify bottom tab bar interaction with admin nav.

ORIGIN (this turn, Tate verbatim 6 May 2026 ~09:33 AEST):
"Quick thing for chambers, the admin suite is only reachable via direct url or through the /events create event button, it should be its own menu item if the user is admin + we need to make sure that the bottom tab bar is working with this nicely. Also can you make SCYCC on the top plan and the feature matrix on the plan page has the ticks aligned
